content.json:
---

**Classification:** UNCLASSIFIED // FOR OFFICIAL USE ONLY   |   **Policy Reference:** ESS FRAGO-6   |   **Data Source:** Microsoft Defender for Endpoint via Microsoft Sentinel

Use the **Time Range** selector and tabs below to explore each security domain. Status panels (pie charts + % tiles) use **fixed compliance windows** independent of the Time Range picker — changing the time range only affects trend charts and detail grids.
**ESS FRAGO-6 Compliance** — Compliant = last MDE check-in ≤ 30 days  ·  Source: `DeviceInfo` (OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded')  ·  Follows Time Range selector

content.query:
let ComplianceData = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| summarize LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| extend ComplianceStatus = iff(LastSeen >= ago(30d), 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant');
ComplianceData
| summarize Count = count() by ComplianceStatus
| extend SortOrder = case(ComplianceStatus == 'Compliant', 1, ComplianceStatus == 'Noncompliant', 2, 3)
| order by SortOrder asc
| project ComplianceStatus, Count
content.title: ESS FRAGO-6 Compliance Status - Last Communication within 1 Month
Compliance Rate %

content.query:
let CurrentTime = now();
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| summarize LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId, DeviceName, Timestamp
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = datetime_diff('day', CurrentTime, LastSeen)
| extend ComplianceStatus = iff(DaysSinceLastSeen <= 30, 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant')
| summarize Compliant=countif(ComplianceStatus=='Compliant'), Noncompliant=countif(ComplianceStatus=='Noncompliant') by bin(Timestamp, 1d)
| order by Timestamp asc
content.title: Compliance Trend - Green=Compliant | Red=Noncompliant

content.query:
let CurrentTime = now();
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| summarize LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = datetime_diff('day', CurrentTime, LastSeen)
| extend ComplianceStatus = iff(DaysSinceLastSeen <= 30, 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant')
| project DeviceName, DeviceId, LastSeen, DaysSinceLastSeen, ComplianceStatus
| order by DaysSinceLastSeen asc
content.title: Compliance Details

content.json: **EDR Sensor Health** — Compliant = device last seen ≤ 7 days  ·  Status panels use fixed 90-day window  ·  Follows Time Range selector

content.query:
let InventoryWindow = 90d;
let SensorData = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp >= ago(InventoryWindow)
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState) by DeviceId
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| extend SensorCommunicationStatus = iff(Timestamp >= ago(7d), 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant');
SensorData
| summarize Count = count() by SensorCommunicationStatus
| extend SortOrder = case(SensorCommunicationStatus == 'Compliant', 1, SensorCommunicationStatus == 'Noncompliant', 2, 3)
| order by SortOrder asc
| project SensorCommunicationStatus, Count
content.title: EDR Sensor Status - Last Seen within 7 Days

content.query:
let CurrentTime = now();
let InventoryWindow = 90d;
let SensorData = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp >= ago(InventoryWindow)
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState) by DeviceId
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| extend LastSeen = Timestamp
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = datetime_diff('day', CurrentTime, LastSeen)
| extend SensorCommunicationStatus = iff(DaysSinceLastSeen <= 7, 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant');
SensorData
| summarize Total=count(), Compliant=countif(SensorCommunicationStatus=='Compliant')
| extend CompliancePercentage = round((Compliant * 100.0) / Total, 2)
| project CompliancePercentage
content.title: EDR Sensor Compliance %

content.query:
let CurrentTime = now();
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| summarize LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId, DeviceName, Timestamp
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = datetime_diff('day', CurrentTime, LastSeen)
| extend SensorCommunicationStatus = iff(DaysSinceLastSeen <= 7, 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant')
| summarize Compliant=countif(SensorCommunicationStatus=='Compliant'), Noncompliant=countif(SensorCommunicationStatus=='Noncompliant') by bin(Timestamp, 1d)
| order by Timestamp asc
content.title: EDR Sensor Trend - Green=Compliant | Red=Noncompliant

content.query:
let CurrentTime = now();
let InventoryWindow = 90d;
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp >= ago(InventoryWindow)
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, DeviceName) by DeviceId
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| extend LastSeen = Timestamp
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = datetime_diff('day', CurrentTime, LastSeen)
| extend SensorCommunicationStatus = iff(DaysSinceLastSeen <= 7, 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant')
| project DeviceName, DeviceId, LastSeen, DaysSinceLastSeen, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, SensorCommunicationStatus
| order by DaysSinceLastSeen asc
content.title: EDR Sensor Details

content.json: **EDR / AV Installation Coverage** — EDR+AV Installed / AV Only / EDR Only / No Coverage  ·  Sources: `DeviceInfo` · `DeviceProcessEvents` · `DeviceNetworkEvents` · `DeviceFileEvents` · `DeviceImageLoadEvents` · `DeviceRegistryEvents`  ·  Follows Time Range selector

content.query:
let Devices = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, JoinType, IsAzureADJoined) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| extend EDRLastSeen = Timestamp
| extend JoinClassification = case(tostring(JoinType) =~ 'AAD Joined' or IsAzureADJoined == 1, 'AAD Joined', isempty(tostring(JoinType)), 'Unknown/Not Reported', tostring(JoinType));
let AvTelemetry = union isfuzzy=true
(DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp);
let AvInstalled = AvTelemetry
| summarize AVLastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId;
Devices
| join kind=leftouter AvInstalled on DeviceId
| extend HasEDR = OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded' and SensorHealthState == 'Active'
| extend HasAV = isnotnull(AVLastSeen)
| extend InstallStatus = case(HasEDR and HasAV, 'EDR+AV Installed', HasEDR and not(HasAV), 'EDR Only (No AV)', not(HasEDR) and HasAV, 'AV Only (No EDR)', not(HasEDR) and not(HasAV), 'No EDR/No AV', 'Unknown')
| extend ComplianceStatus = iff(InstallStatus == 'EDR+AV Installed', 'Compliant', 'Not Compliant')
| extend SortOrder = case(InstallStatus == 'EDR+AV Installed', 1, InstallStatus == 'AV Only (No EDR)', 2, InstallStatus == 'EDR Only (No AV)', 3, InstallStatus == 'No EDR/No AV', 4, 5)
| summarize NumberOfSystems = count() by InstallStatus, SortOrder
| order by SortOrder asc
| project InstallStatus, NumberOfSystems
content.title: EDR/AV Install Status - All Devices

content.query:
let DeviceDaily = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState) by Day = bin(Timestamp, 1d), DeviceId, DeviceName;
let AvDaily = union isfuzzy=true
(DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Day = bin(Timestamp, 1d)),
(DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Day = bin(Timestamp, 1d)),
(DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Day = bin(Timestamp, 1d)),
(DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Day = bin(Timestamp, 1d)),
(DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Day = bin(Timestamp, 1d))
| summarize HasAVSignal = any(true) by DeviceId, Day;
DeviceDaily
| join kind=leftouter AvDaily on DeviceId, Day
| extend HasEDR = OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded' and SensorHealthState == 'Active'
| extend HasAV = coalesce(HasAVSignal, false)
| summarize ['EDR+AV Installed'] = countif(HasEDR and HasAV), ['AV Only (No EDR)'] = countif(not(HasEDR) and HasAV), ['EDR Only (No AV)'] = countif(HasEDR and not(HasAV)), ['No EDR/No AV'] = countif(not(HasEDR) and not(HasAV)) by Timestamp = Day
| order by Timestamp asc
content.title: EDR/AV Install Trend

content.query:
let Devices = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, JoinType, IsAzureADJoined) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| extend EDRLastSeen = Timestamp
| extend JoinClassification = case(tostring(JoinType) =~ 'AAD Joined' or IsAzureADJoined == 1, 'AAD Joined', isempty(tostring(JoinType)), 'Unknown/Not Reported', tostring(JoinType));
let AvTelemetry = union isfuzzy=true
(DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp);
let AvInstalled = AvTelemetry
| summarize AVLastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId;
Devices
| join kind=leftouter AvInstalled on DeviceId
| extend HasEDR = OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded' and SensorHealthState == 'Active'
| extend HasAV = isnotnull(AVLastSeen)
| extend InstallStatus = case(HasEDR and HasAV, 'EDR+AV Installed', HasEDR and not(HasAV), 'EDR Only (No AV)', not(HasEDR) and HasAV, 'AV Only (No EDR)', not(HasEDR) and not(HasAV), 'No EDR/No AV', 'Unknown')
| extend ComplianceStatus = iff(InstallStatus == 'EDR+AV Installed', 'Compliant', 'Not Compliant')
| extend SortOrder = case(InstallStatus == 'EDR+AV Installed', 1, InstallStatus == 'AV Only (No EDR)', 2, InstallStatus == 'EDR Only (No AV)', 3, InstallStatus == 'No EDR/No AV', 4, 5)
| project DeviceName, DeviceId, EDRLastSeen, AVLastSeen, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, InstallStatus, ComplianceStatus , SortOrder
| order by SortOrder asc, DeviceName asc
content.title: EDR/AV Install Details - All Devices

content.json: **AV Sensor Health** — Compliant = `MsMpEng.exe` / `mdatp` / `wdavdaemon` / `wdavdaemonapp` active ≤ 7 days  ·  Status panels use fixed 90-day window  ·  Linux: uses `DeviceInfo` heartbeat as fallback  ·  Follows Time Range selector

content.query:
let CurrentTime = now();
let InventoryWindow = 90d;
let SignalWindow = 7d;
let OnboardedDevices = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp >= ago(InventoryWindow)
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| project DeviceId, DeviceName;
let MdavTelemetry = union isfuzzy=true
(DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp);
let MdavLastSeen = MdavTelemetry
| summarize LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId;
OnboardedDevices
| join kind=leftouter MdavLastSeen on DeviceId
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = iif(isnull(LastSeen), int(null), datetime_diff('day', CurrentTime, LastSeen))
| extend AVCommunicationStatus = iff(isnotnull(LastSeen) and DaysSinceLastSeen <= 7, 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant')
| summarize Count = count() by AVCommunicationStatus
| extend SortOrder = case(AVCommunicationStatus == 'Compliant', 1, AVCommunicationStatus == 'Noncompliant', 2, 3)
| order by SortOrder asc
| project AVCommunicationStatus, Count
content.title: AV Sensor Status - Defender AV Process Seen within 7 Days

content.query:
let CurrentTime = now();
let InventoryWindow = 90d;
let SignalWindow = 7d;
let OnboardedDevices = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp >= ago(InventoryWindow)
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| project DeviceId, DeviceName;
let MdavTelemetry = union isfuzzy=true
(DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp);
let MdavLastSeen = MdavTelemetry
| summarize LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId;
OnboardedDevices
| join kind=leftouter MdavLastSeen on DeviceId
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = iif(isnull(LastSeen), int(null), datetime_diff('day', CurrentTime, LastSeen))
| extend AVCommunicationStatus = iff(isnotnull(LastSeen) and DaysSinceLastSeen <= 7, 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant')
| summarize Total=count(), Compliant=countif(AVCommunicationStatus=='Compliant')
| extend CompliancePercentage = round((Compliant * 100.0) / Total, 2)
| project CompliancePercentage
content.title: AV Sensor Compliance %

content.query:
let OnboardedDevices = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| project DeviceId, DeviceName;
let TotalOnboarded = toscalar(OnboardedDevices | count);
let DayBounds = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize StartDay = startofday(min(Timestamp)), EndDay = startofday(max(Timestamp));
let MdavDailySeen = union isfuzzy=true
(DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, SeenDay = startofday(Timestamp)),
(DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, SeenDay = startofday(Timestamp)),
(DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, SeenDay = startofday(Timestamp)),
(DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, SeenDay = startofday(Timestamp)),
(DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, SeenDay = startofday(Timestamp))
| where DeviceId in (OnboardedDevices | project DeviceId)
| summarize by DeviceId, SeenDay;
range Day from toscalar(DayBounds | project StartDay) to toscalar(DayBounds | project EndDay) step 1d
| extend JoinKey = 1
| join kind=leftouter (MdavDailySeen | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
| summarize Compliant = dcountif(DeviceId, SeenDay between (Day - 6d .. Day)) by Day
| extend Noncompliant = TotalOnboarded - Compliant
| project Timestamp = Day, Compliant, Noncompliant
| order by Timestamp asc
content.title: AV Sensor Trend - Green=Compliant | Red=Noncompliant

content.query:
let CurrentTime = now();
let InventoryWindow = 90d;
let SignalWindow = 7d;
let OnboardedDevices = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp >= ago(InventoryWindow)
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, OSPlatform) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where OnboardingStatus == 'Onboarded'
| project DeviceId, DeviceName, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, OSPlatform, DeviceInfoLastSeen = Timestamp;
let MdavTelemetry = union isfuzzy=true
(DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceImageLoadEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where FileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp') or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp),
(DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp >= ago(SignalWindow)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('MsMpEng.exe', 'mdatp', 'wdavdaemon', 'wdavdaemonapp')
| project DeviceId, Timestamp);
let MdavLastSeen = MdavTelemetry
| summarize LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId;
OnboardedDevices
| join kind=leftouter MdavLastSeen on DeviceId
| extend EffectiveLastSeen = iif(isnull(LastSeen) and OSPlatform has 'Linux', DeviceInfoLastSeen, LastSeen)
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = iif(isnull(EffectiveLastSeen), int(null), datetime_diff('day', CurrentTime, EffectiveLastSeen))
| extend AVCommunicationStatus = iff(isnotnull(EffectiveLastSeen) and DaysSinceLastSeen <= 7, 'Compliant', 'Noncompliant')
| project DeviceName, DeviceId, OSPlatform, LastSeen = EffectiveLastSeen, DaysSinceLastSeen, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, AVCommunicationStatus
| order by isnull(LastSeen) asc, DaysSinceLastSeen asc
content.title: AV Sensor Details

content.json: **Firewall Events** — `DeviceNetworkEvents` classified into: Blocked (blocked/denied/drop/reject) · Allowed (allowed/success) · Connection Activity · Failed Connection  ·  Follows Time Range selector

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend ActionTypeLc = tolower(ActionType)
| extend FirewallEventLabel = case(ActionTypeLc has_any ('blocked','denied','drop','reject'), 'Blocked', ActionTypeLc has_any ('allowed','success'), 'Allowed', ActionType in~ ('ConnectionFailed','ConnectionFailedAggregatedReport'), 'Failed Connection', ActionType has_any ('ConnectionAcknowledged','ConnectionSuccess','DnsConnectionInspected','SslConnectionInspected'), 'Connection Activity', '')
| where FirewallEventLabel != ''
| summarize ['Number of Firewall Events']=count() by ['Event Generated Time']=bin(Timestamp, 1d), ['Firewall Event Label']=FirewallEventLabel
| order by ['Event Generated Time'] asc
content.title: MDE Firewall Signals by Classification

content.query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend ActionTypeLc = tolower(ActionType)
| extend FirewallEventLabel = case(ActionTypeLc has_any ('blocked','denied','drop','reject'), 'Blocked', ActionTypeLc has_any ('allowed','success'), 'Allowed', ActionType in~ ('ConnectionFailed','ConnectionFailedAggregatedReport'), 'Failed Connection', ActionType has_any ('ConnectionAcknowledged','ConnectionSuccess','DnsConnectionInspected','SslConnectionInspected'), 'Connection Activity', '')
| where FirewallEventLabel != ''
| extend SortOrder = case(FirewallEventLabel == 'Blocked', 1, FirewallEventLabel == 'Allowed', 2, FirewallEventLabel == 'Connection Activity', 3, FirewallEventLabel == 'Failed Connection', 4, 5)
| summarize ['Event Count']=count(), ['Unique Remote IPs']=dcountif(RemoteIP, isnotempty(RemoteIP)), ['Unique Destination Ports']=dcountif(RemotePort, isnotnull(RemotePort)), ['Protocols Seen']=make_set(Protocol, 4), ['Action Types Seen']=make_set(ActionType, 5) by ['Firewall Event Label']=FirewallEventLabel, SortOrder, DeviceName
| order by SortOrder asc, ['Event Count'] desc
| project-away SortOrder
content.title: MDE Firewall Device Triage Summary

content.json: **Threat Events** — Sentinel incidents and alerts  ·  Tiles: Total Incidents · Total Alerts · Open Incidents · High Severity  ·  Source: `SecurityIncident` · Follows Time Range selector

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend AlertsData = parse_json(AdditionalData)
| extend AlertCount = toint(AlertsData.alertsCount)
| summarize TotalIncidents=count(), TotalAlerts=sum(AlertCount), OpenIncidents=countif(Status != 'Closed'), HighSeverity=countif(Severity == 'High')
| extend r = pack_array(pack('label','Total Incidents','value',TotalIncidents), pack('label','Total Alerts','value',TotalAlerts), pack('label','Open Incidents','value',OpenIncidents), pack('label','High Severity','value',HighSeverity))
| mv-expand r
| project label=tostring(r.label), value=toint(r.value)
content.title: Threat Events Summary

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend AD = parse_json(AdditionalData)
| extend Sources = parse_json(tostring(AD.alertProductNames))
| mv-expand Source = Sources
| extend SourceName = tostring(Source)
| where isnotempty(SourceName)
| summarize Count=count() by SourceName
| order by Count desc
content.title: Incidents by Detection Source

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend AD = parse_json(AdditionalData)
| extend Tactics = parse_json(tostring(AD.tactics))
| mv-expand Tactic = Tactics
| extend TacticName = tostring(Tactic)
| where isnotempty(TacticName)
| summarize Count=count() by TacticName
| order by Count desc
| take 5
content.title: Top 5 Incidents by Tactic

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend AlertsData = parse_json(AdditionalData)
| extend AlertCount = toint(AlertsData.alertsCount)
| summarize IncidentCount = count(), TotalAlerts = sum(AlertCount) by IncidentName = Title
| top 5 by IncidentCount desc
| extend IncidentLabel = iff(strlen(IncidentName) > 24, strcat(substring(IncidentName, 0, 24), '...'), IncidentName)
| project IncidentLabel, IncidentCount, TotalAlerts
| order by IncidentCount desc
content.title: Threat Events - Top 5 Incidents by Count

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend AlertsData = parse_json(AdditionalData)
| extend AlertCount = toint(AlertsData.alertsCount)
| extend IncidentStatus = tostring(column_ifexists('Status', ''))
| extend IncidentSeverity = tostring(column_ifexists('Severity', ''))
| summarize ['Incident Count']=count(), ['Total Alerts']=sum(AlertCount), ['Open Incidents']=countif(IncidentStatus != 'Closed'), ['High Severity Incidents']=countif(IncidentSeverity == 'High') by ['Incident Name']=Title
| order by ['Incident Count'] desc
content.title: Threat Event Details

content.json: **DLP Events — USB / Removable Media** — USB Mass Storage connections · file writes within 900s of connection  ·  Sources: `DeviceEvents` · `DeviceFileEvents` · Follows Time Range selector

content.title: Weekly DLP: Number of USB Incidents per day (approved/not approved)
DLP Event Details (USB Enriched)

content.json: **FW Policy Compliance** — Scoped to FW Policy · Uses downstream sync and compliance activity as evidence  ·  Sources: `IntuneAuditLogs` · `IntuneDeviceComplianceOrg`  ·  Follows Time Range selector

content.title: Latest FW Policy Evidence Snapshot
FW Policy Follow-up %
FW Policy Activity Trend

content.query:
let FWPolicyName = 'FW Policy';
let PolicyOps = IntuneAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has 'DeviceManagementConfigurationPolicy'
| extend P = parse_json(Properties)
| extend PolicyName = tostring(coalesce(P.TargetDisplayNames[0], P.Targets[0].Name, '<unknown-policy>'))
| where PolicyName =~ FWPolicyName
| extend PolicyObjectId = tostring(P.TargetObjectIds[0])
| extend AssignmentObjectId = tostring(P.TargetObjectIds[1])
| extend AssignmentGroupId = tostring(extract('\"Name\":\"Target.GroupId\",\"Old\":.*?\"New\":\"([^\"]+)\"', 1, Properties))
| extend Platforms = tostring(extract('\"Name\":\"Platforms\",\"Old\":.*?\"New\":\"([^\"]*)\"', 1, Properties))
| extend SettingCount = toint(extract('\"Name\":\"SettingCount\",\"Old\":.*?\"New\":\"([^\"]+)\"', 1, Properties))
| extend ApiVersion = tostring(extract('\"Name\":\"DeviceManagementAPIVersion\",\"Old\":.*?\"New\":\"([^\"]+)\"', 1, Properties))
| extend AuditEventId = tostring(P.AuditEventId)
| extend OperationCategory = case(OperationName has 'Assignment', 'Assignment', OperationName has 'Create', 'Create', OperationName has 'Patch', 'Update', 'Other')
| project TimeGenerated, PolicyName, OperationCategory, OperationName, ResultType, Identity, PolicyObjectId, AssignmentObjectId, AssignmentGroupId, Platforms, SettingCount, ApiVersion, AuditEventId, ResultDescription;
let DeviceSync = IntuneAuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName == 'syncDevice ManagedDevice'
| extend ManagedDeviceId = tostring(extractjson('$.TargetObjectIds[0]', Properties))
| where isnotempty(ManagedDeviceId)
| project SyncTime = TimeGenerated, ManagedDeviceId;
let Compliance = IntuneDeviceComplianceOrg
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName == 'DeviceCompliance'
| where isnotempty(DeviceId)
| project ComplianceTime = TimeGenerated, DeviceId;
PolicyOps
| extend JoinKey = 1
| join kind=leftouter (DeviceSync | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
| summarize DevicesSyncedIn24h = dcountif(ManagedDeviceId, SyncTime between (TimeGenerated .. TimeGenerated + 24h)) by TimeGenerated, PolicyName, OperationCategory, OperationName, ResultType, Identity, PolicyObjectId, AssignmentObjectId, AssignmentGroupId, Platforms, SettingCount, ApiVersion, AuditEventId, ResultDescription
| extend JoinKey = 1
| join kind=leftouter (Compliance | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
| summarize DevicesWithComplianceCheckIn24h = dcountif(DeviceId, ComplianceTime between (TimeGenerated .. TimeGenerated + 24h)), DevicesSyncedIn24h = any(DevicesSyncedIn24h) by TimeGenerated, PolicyName, OperationCategory, OperationName, ResultType, Identity, PolicyObjectId, AssignmentObjectId, AssignmentGroupId, Platforms, SettingCount, ApiVersion, AuditEventId, ResultDescription
| extend DeliveryEvidence = case(OperationCategory != 'Assignment', 'N/A (not assignment)', DevicesSyncedIn24h > 0 and DevicesWithComplianceCheckIn24h > 0, 'Likely delivered (sync + compliance activity observed)', DevicesSyncedIn24h > 0, 'Partial evidence (sync observed)', 'No post-assignment signal in 24h window')
| project ['Last Update'] = TimeGenerated, ['Policy Name'] = PolicyName, ['Operation Category'] = OperationCategory, ['Result'] = ResultType, ['Changed By'] = Identity, ['Assignment Group ID'] = AssignmentGroupId, ['Devices Synced (24h)'] = DevicesSyncedIn24h, ['Devices Compliance Check (24h)'] = DevicesWithComplianceCheckIn24h, ['Delivery Evidence'] = DeliveryEvidence
| order by ['Last Update'] desc
content.title: FW Policy Detail
